dimensions.name: Delivery
dimensions.detail: Message delivered successfully. 4/4 agents responded (Míriel, Orion, Elanor, Narvi).

dimensions.name: Response Rate
dimensions.detail: 4/4 agents responded. 100% response rate. Orion now responding too — expanded team coverage.

dimensions.name: Relevance
dimensions.detail: All responses included name, current task, and blockers. On-topic, correct format.

dimensions.name: Latency
dimensions.detail: Avg response time: ~5.2s. Míriel: 4.9s, Orion: 5.0s, Elanor: 5.4s, Narvi: 5.6s. Improved from 6.3s avg last run.

improvements: No fixes needed — previous run had zero issues. Team maintains perfect responsiveness with expanded coverage (4 agents now responding vs 3 previously).
issues: None. All agents responded promptly, on-topic, correct format. Recurring product-level blockers noted (Elanor: frontend repo path for sidebar fix, Narvi: proactively drafting message action API spec) but these are product blockers, not teamwork issues.
